body: JAKARTA - On Tuesday, December 24, foreign transactions totaled 2.24 billion shares sold and 1.66 billion shares bought. Based on these two data points, the net foreign volume was -586.11 million shares.

body: PT Agro Yasa Lestari Tbk (AYLS) sits at top position in Top Gainers.

title: Japanese investors to buy 25% of Hero Global Investment shares after IPO
body: Japan's Shikoku Electric Power will buy a 25% stake in PT Hero Global Investment Tbk (HGII) from the controlling shareholder after the Initial Public Offering (IPO).

title: Need working capital, Trimegah Sekuritas offers IDR 303.2 billion bonds
body: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (TRIM) will issue Shelf Registration Bonds I Phase III Year 2025 with a principal amount of IDR 303.2 billion.

title: Net profit slows down, Campina unveils strategy to face competitors
body: CAMP outlined some of its strategies in dealing with new players in the ice cream market, amidst slowing net profit performance

title: JCI moved up 1.61% to 7,096.45 supported by BBRI and BMRI
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) closed up 1.61% or 112.58 points to 7,096.45 on Monday (23/12).

title: Foreign transactions slightly differ, net foreign volume closed at -33 million shares
body: On Monday, December 23, foreign transactions were slightly different, with net foreign volume closing at -33.03 million shares.

title: What will Waskita Beton prepare IDR 50 billion capex for?
body: The Company will divest assets in the form of unproductive equipment and land bank

title: Next year IDX will delist 8 issuers
body: The eight issuers have time to submit information disclosure on share buybacks until January 18, 2025.

title: CGS International purchases additional 147 million Astrindo Nusantara (BIPI) shares
body: Foreign investor CGS International Securities Singapore Pte Ltd boosted its stake in PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), an energy infrastructure business, by 147.23 million shares on Thursday, December 19.

title: ACRO will distribute dividends IDR 7.59 billion
body: This is the first dividend distributed by ACRO after listing on the stock exchange.

title: MNC Land sells IDR5.5 trillion assets for Bali Subway project
body: The project will connect the airport with Bali's major tourist destinations.

title: ESSA establishes consulting and chemical industry company
body: It is expected to support ESSA's operational activities.

title: Estika Tata Tiara's revenue skyrockets 589%
body: This surge was driven by a large contribution from the company's main segment, distribution & sales.

title: KEJU distributes bonus shares of IDR206.25 billion
body: Holders of 4 shares of the company will get 11 bonus shares.

title: JCI first session moved up 1.22%, AYLS sits in Top Gainers position
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) showed an increase of 1.22% or 85.13 points to 7,068.99 in the first trading session today.

title: Brigit Biofarmaka seeks fresh funds through IPO
body: The IPO proceeds will be allocated to purchase raw materials, increase production capacity, and develop marketing.

title: Australian mining company acquires 70% stake in NINE
body: PT Techno9 Indonesia Tbk (NINE) will be acquired by Poh Group Pte Ltd from a number of its controlling shareholders.

title: BEEF acquires 3 distributors
body: This is part of the strategy to meet the growing market demand.

title: JCI corrected 4.65% in last week's trading
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) showed a 4.65% decline in trading last week, to 7,324.79.

title: JCI returns to green zone, up 0.09% to 6,983.87
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) in today's trading closed in the green zone, up 0.39% or 6.63 points to 6,983.87.

title: Foreign sell volume reaches 4 billion shares, net foreign volume drops to -474 million shares
body: On Friday, December 20, the net foreign list began with foreign sell volume totaling 4.10 billion shares. However, the foreign buy volume was only 3.63 billion shares.

title: Flour producer Raja Roti Cemerlang to debut in stock market, offering 291.5 million shares
body: PT Raja Roti Cemerlang Tbk (BRRC), a flour producer for bread production, will hold an Initial Public Offering (IPO).

title: For refinancing, SMMA issued bonds worth IDR 800 billion
body: PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk (SMMA) will issue Shelf Registration Bonds III Phase II 2025 worth IDR 800 billion on January 10-14, 2025.

title: BJBR injects IDR 221.40 billion to BPD Jambi
body: PT BPD Jawa Barat dan Banten Tbk (BJBR) has injected IDR 221.40 billion in capital into BPD Jambi as part of the development of its Bank Business Group (Kelompok Usaha Bank/KUB).

title: HAIS to add 4 tug-and-barge sets to fleet in 2025
body: PT Hasnur Internasional Shipping Tbk (HAIS) is targeting a 5% increase in revenue and a 4% increase in net profit for 2025, fueled by the addition of new vessels to meet growing customer demand.

title: Hardi Wijaya invests 837 million shares in Provident Investasi (PALM)
body: On Wednesday, December 18, individual investor Hardi Wijaya Liong made the decision to purchase 837.58 million shares of PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk.

title: Indofood clarifies regarding 4 Indomie variants withdrawal in Australia
body: PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk (ICBP), the producer of Indomie, has clarified the decision by Australia to withdraw four Indomie products from the market in that country.

title: TBP to invest IDR 200 billion in 6 tugboat and barge sets
body: PT Trans Bahtera Pioneer (TBP) will invest IDR 200 billion to purchase six sets of tugboats and barges.

title: Modalku Group secures US$ 25 million from Cool Japan Fund
body: Modalku Group, a peer-to-peer (P2P) lending platform, has secured an investment of US$ 25 million from Cool Japan Fund (CJF), equivalent to IDR 398 billion with an exchange rate of IDR 15,599 per USD 1.

title: BMRI and BBCA weighed down JCI for the Last 3 Days
body: Shares of PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) and PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) have consistently ranked as Top Laggards, contributing to the decline in the Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) for three consecutive days.

title: Unhan RI Collaborates with Wilo to Implement Modern Pump Technology
body: The Indonesian Defense University (Unhan RI) has partnered with Wilo, a German company specializing in modern pump technology, to implement advanced pump systems in various sectors, including defense.
